mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Review ( user_id, company_no, res_no, rating, title, content, original_name, stored_name, img_url,is_paid, booking_source, total_cost, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{companyNo}, #{resNo}, #{rating}, #{title}, #{content}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{imgUrl}, #{isPaid}, #{bookingSource}, #{totalCost}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT R.review_no, R.user_id, R.company_no, C.com_name as company_name, R.rating, R.title, R.content, R.booking_source, R.total_cost, R.stored_name, R.reg_date, R.is_paid, R.approval_status, R.view_cnt, R.like_cnt FROM Review R LEFT JOIN Company C ON R.company_no = C.company_no
AND C.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND R.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Review_Like (review_no, user_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Review SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}
